---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug that affects OpsIQ's operation, performance, or reliability
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is and how it impacts your ecommerce operations.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what should have happened — e.g., what decision the agent should have made, what the dashboard should have shown.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or relevant log output from `structlog` or the dashboard console.

## Environment

| Detail | Value |
|:---|---:|
| OpsIQ Version | e.g., v0.1.0 (`git rev-parse HEAD`) |
| Deployment | Docker / Local / Cloud |
| LLM Provider | Google Gemini / OpenAI / DeepSeek |
| Shopify Store | Dev store / Production |
| Redis | Yes / No |
| Python Version | 3.11 / 3.12 |
| OS | macOS / Linux / Windows |

## Agent Context (if applicable)
- **Agent(s) affected:** Fraud / Inventory / Pricing / Reviews / Marketing
- **Confidence score:** e.g., 0.72
- **Decision:** Approved / Rejected / Escalated

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here — recent changes, unusual store activity, etc.
